features.name: robot_left_of_target_center
features.source:
def f61(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    result = robot_x < target_cx
    return bool(result)

features.name: robot_inside_target_region
features.source:
def f65(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    inside_x = (robot_x >= target_x) and (robot_x <= target_x + target_width)
    inside_y = (robot_y >= target_y) and (robot_y <= target_y + target_height)
    return bool(inside_x and inside_y)

features.name: robot_close_to_target_center
features.source:
def f66(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    manhattan = abs(robot_x - target_cx) + abs(robot_y - target_cy)
    return bool(manhattan < 0.5)

features.source:
def f70(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    zone_left = obstacle0_x
    zone_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width + robot_base_radius
    result = (robot_x >= zone_left) and (robot_x < zone_right)
    return bool(result)

features.source:
def f72(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y - robot_base_radius
    result = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    return bool(result)

def f75(s, a):

    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    offset = abs(robot_y - gap_center)
    return bool(offset < 0.05)

features.name: action_dx_toward_target
features.source:
def f78(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    to_target = target_cx - robot_x
    delta = a[0]
    result = (to_target * delta) > 0
    return bool(result)

def f79(s, a):

    target_height = s[18]

    to_target = target_cy - robot_y

    return bool(result)

features.name: action_dy_toward_passage0_gap_center
features.source:
def f80(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - robot_y
    delta = a[1]
    result = (to_gap * delta) > 0
    return bool(result)

features.name: action_dx_positive_inside_passage0_zone
features.source:
def f81(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    zone_left = obstacle0_x
    zone_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width + robot_base_radius
    inside_zone = (robot_x >= zone_left) and (robot_x < zone_right)
    dx = a[0]
    result = inside_zone and (dx > 0)
    return bool(result)

features.name: action_dy_negative_above_passage0_gap

def f85(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y - robot_base_radius
    above_gap = robot_y > gap_upper

    return bool(result)

features.name: action_dtheta_toward_target
features.source:
def f86(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_theta = s[2]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    import math
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    desired_theta = math.atan2(to_target_y, to_target_x)
    angle_error = desired_theta - robot_theta
    while angle_error > math.pi: angle_error -= 2*math.pi
    while angle_error < -math.pi: angle_error += 2*math.pi
    dtheta = a[2]
    result = (angle_error * dtheta) > 0
    return bool(result)

def f100(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    obstacle1_x = s[29]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_width = s[37]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    inside_x = (robot_x >= obstacle1_x) and (robot_x <= obstacle1_x + obstacle1_width)
    inside_y = (robot_y >= obstacle1_y) and (robot_y <= obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height)
    return bool(inside_x and inside_y)

features.name: robot_can_fit_passage0_gap
features.source:
def f101(s, a):
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y
    gap_width = gap_upper - gap_lower
    return bool(2 * robot_base_radius < gap_width)

features.name: robot_y_between_obstacles
features.source:
def f102(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    top0 = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height
    bottom1 = obstacle1_y
    return bool((robot_y > top0) and (robot_y < bottom1))

def f107(s, a):
    return bool((a[0] == 0) and (a[1] == 0) and (a[2] == 0) and (a[3] == 0) and (a[4] == 0))

features.name: robot_inside_passage0_zone_and_action_dx_positive
features.source:
def f122(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    zone_left = obstacle0_x
    zone_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width + robot_base_radius
    inside_zone = (robot_x >= zone_left) and (robot_x < zone_right)
    dx = a[0]
    return bool(inside_zone and (dx > 0))

features.name: robot_y_aligned_with_passage0_gap_and_action_dy_positive
features.source:
def f123(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y - robot_base_radius
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    dy = a[1]
    return bool(aligned and (dy > 0))
